'''Dalia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[First Sergeant/Legends|First Sergeant]] and a [[GeNode]], and for a brief time, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation of Kashyyyk]], the sergeant was dispatched to [[Janzor]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]]. Known for being brave and skilled with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], Sergeant Dalia led the charge on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] outpost, skillfully dodging blaster fire and advancing on the enemy. However, the Wookiees ambushed the group later in the day, and Dalia died in the subsequent battle.<ref name="Pax Empirica" />
